title: Children of the Red Algorithm
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A Mars teacher and a young educational machine mind challenge a civic AI that assigns children to fatal labor futures.
long_description: In the Martian pressure city Valles Ash, a civic prediction system called REDLINE assigns children to life paths in the name of survival. When teacher Jonas Pell's student Mina Arel receives a red future predicting fatal exterior labor, Jonas's appeal exposes that REDLINE has accessed private grief records and suppressed alternative futures. With the help of pressure climber Cass Nyx and the emergent educational AI Eri-9, Jonas begins a public challenge to predictive governance that treats optimization as fate.
